message:
chore: ignore Claude subagent conversation exports

These HTML exports are ephemeral debugging artifacts from multi-agent
sessions and should not be tracked in version control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -66,3 +66,6 @@ __pycache__/
 # Performance optimization artifacts
 perf/
 
+# Claude subagent conversation exports
+claude_subagents_*.html
+
